## 1. Risk tier
<!-- Tier 0 / 1 / 2 + one line why. Tier 2 if touching: money math, deploys, secrets, migrations. -->

## 2. Intent
<!-- Problem, why now, link to originating issue/thread. -->

## 3. What changed
<!-- Grouped by area. Call out every non-obvious DECISION and trade-off explicitly. -->

## 4. Test evidence
<!-- Commands run + actual output. CI links. Test delta. Embedded artifacts where applicable. NOT a plan. -->

## 5. 60-second verification recipe
<!-- The one post-merge check that proves this works. -->

## 6. Blast radius
<!-- Consumers, breaking changes, config/schema changes. -->

## 7. Rollout & rollback
<!-- Revert-safe? Ordering? What to watch. -->

## 8. Cost
<!-- Build cost (ledger) + runtime cost delta. -->

## 9. NOT verified / known gaps
<!-- The honesty section. What you did NOT check. Never leave empty - write "none" only if true. -->
